nodes.name: Global Styles
nodes.summary: CSS custom properties for design tokens (colors, shadows, radii, spacing, transitions, fonts), global element resets, and keyframe animations

nodes.name: :root design tokens
nodes.summary: Defines CSS custom properties for primary navy, accent amber, surface grays, semantic colors (online/offline/info/warning), shadow levels, border radii, spacing scale, transition curves, and font stack

nodes.name: spin
nodes.summary: 360-degree rotation animation for loading spinners

nodes.name: fadeIn
nodes.summary: Fade-in with slight upward translate for entrance effects

nodes.name: pulse
nodes.summary: Opacity pulse for loading/skeleton states

nodes.name: slideUp
nodes.summary: Slide-up fade-in for content reveal

nodes.name: shimmer
nodes.summary: Horizontal gradient sweep for skeleton loading effect

nodes.name: pageEnter
nodes.summary: Subtle fade-in translate for page transitions

nodes.name: .spin .fade-in .slide-up .page-transition
nodes.summary: Utility classes applying keyframe animations

nodes.name: Home Page
nodes.summary: Root page — immediately redirects to /dashboard

nodes.name: Home
nodes.summary: Default export — calls redirect('/dashboard')
